ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Request For Setting A Default Prove- Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Francisco G. Torres, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, McCormack Baron Ragan Management Services, Inc.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Farley Levonta.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court grants Judgment for Injuctive Relief in favor of Plaintiff McCormack Baron Ragan Management and againste Defendant Farley Levonta.
Judgment read into the record and signed in open court.
